requirement_topic.en: RoHS / Hazardous Substances — Myanmar Has No Horizontal RoHS Law
requirement_topic.zh: RoHS / 有害物质——缅甸无横向 RoHS 立法
requirement_topic.zht: RoHS / 有害物質——緬甸無橫向 RoHS 立法

summary.en: Myanmar has no horizontal RoHS (Restriction of Hazardous Substances) legislation for electrical and electronic equipment as of 2026. There is no Myanmar law or MSTRD mandatory standard that mirrors the EU RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU or China's SJ/T 11363 framework, restricting lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, and PBDE in LED luminaires as a condition of import or sale. Hazardous substance restrictions for electrical products are not enforced at Myanmar's borders as standalone market-access conditions. Importers and buyers may include RoHS self-declaration requirements in private purchase contracts, but these are contractual, not statutory.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对电气和电子设备没有横向 RoHS（有害物质限制）立法。缅甸没有类似欧盟 RoHS 指令 2011/65/EU 或中国 SJ/T 11363 框架的法律或 MSTRD 强制标准，将铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB 和 PBDE 在 LED 灯具中的限制作为进口或销售条件。有害物质对电气产品的限制在缅甸边境不作为独立市场准入条件执行。进口商和采购方可在私人采购合同中包含 RoHS 自我声明要求，但这属于合同约定，而非法定要求。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對電氣和電子設備沒有橫向 RoHS（有害物質限制）立法。緬甸沒有類似歐盟 RoHS 指令 2011/65/EU 或中國 SJ/T 11363 框架的法律或 MSTRD 強制標準，將鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB 和 PBDE 在 LED 燈具中的限制作為進口或銷售條件。有害物質對電氣產品的限制在緬甸邊境不作為獨立市場准入條件執行。進口商和採購方可在私人採購合同中包含 RoHS 自我聲明要求，但這屬於合同約定，而非法定要求。

standards_or_laws: No Myanmar horizontal RoHS law applicable to LED luminaires as of 2026
MSTRD MS standards do not include mandatory hazardous substance content limits for LED luminaires

summary.en: China's equivalent is the Management Methods for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (Order No. 32, 2016, amended 2019), which mandates hazardous substance disclosure and labelling under SJ/T 11364 for all EEE products. LED luminaires must carry the China RoHS "e" disclosure label and provide a material declaration table covering the six restricted substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE). China RoHS does not set absolute ban thresholds for all products — it requires disclosure and, for products on the Catalogue, compliance with concentration limits equivalent to RoHS 2 thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国对应制度为《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》（工信部 32 号令，2016 年颁布，2019 年修订），要求依据 SJ/T 11364 对所有电子电气产品进行有害物质披露和标注。LED 灯具须贴附中国 RoHS「e」披露标签，并提供涵盖六种限制物质（Pb、Hg、Cd、Cr6+、PBB、PBDE）的材料申报表。中国 RoHS 并非对所有产品设定绝对禁限阈值——其要求进行信息披露，对于列入目录的产品，须符合与 RoHS 2 阈值相当的浓度限值。
summary.zht: 中國對應制度為《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》（工信部 32 號令，2016 年頒布，2019 年修訂），要求依據 SJ/T 11364 對所有電子電氣產品進行有害物質披露和標注。LED 燈具須貼附中國 RoHS「e」披露標籤，並提供涵蓋六種限制物質（Pb、Hg、Cd、Cr6+、PBB、PBDE）的材料申報表。中國 RoHS 並非對所有產品設定絕對禁限閾值——其要求進行信息披露，對於列入目錄的產品，須符合與 RoHS 2 閾值相當的濃度限值。

standards_or_laws: Management Methods for Restriction of Use of Hazardous Substances in EEE (Order No. 32, 2016 / 2019 amendment) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products

gap.en: The gap runs entirely in reverse: China imposes mandatory RoHS-equivalent hazardous substance disclosure and labelling obligations on LED luminaires; Myanmar imposes none. Chinese exporters to Myanmar do not need to satisfy any Myanmar-side hazardous substance restriction as a statutory requirement. Buyers sourcing for projects with international financing (World Bank, ADB) may impose IEC or RoHS-equivalent contractual requirements regardless of Myanmar law — exporters should clarify contract terms. No Myanmar-specific hazardous substance testing or documentation is required for customs clearance.
gap.zh: 差距完全呈反向：中国对 LED 灯具施加强制性 RoHS 等效有害物质披露和标注义务；缅甸无任何此类法定要求。中国出口商向缅甸出口无需满足任何缅甸方面的有害物质限制法定要求。为获得国际融资（世界银行、亚洲开发银行）项目供货的采购方，可能无论缅甸法律如何都会在合同中施加 IEC 或 RoHS 等效要求——出口商应明确合同条款。缅甸海关通关不要求任何缅甸特定有害物质检测或文件。
gap.zht: 差距完全呈反向：中國對 LED 燈具施加強制性 RoHS 等效有害物質披露和標注義務；緬甸無任何此類法定要求。中國出口商向緬甸出口無需滿足任何緬甸方面的有害物質限制法定要求。為獲得國際融資（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行）項目供貨的採購方，可能無論緬甸法律如何都會在合同中施加 IEC 或 RoHS 等效要求——出口商應明確合同條款。緬甸海關通關不要求任何緬甸特定有害物質檢測或文件。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — Myanmar has no horizontal RoHS or hazardous substance restriction law for LED luminaires as of 2026; no statutory hazardous substance documentation required for Myanmar market entry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China RoHS disclosure labelling (SJ/T 11364) required for all EEE products placed on the CN market; concentration limits apply to Catalogue products

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no horizontal RoHS legislation for LED luminaires as of 2026. No hazardous substance restriction documentation is required for Myanmar customs clearance or market entry. Chinese RoHS disclosure documentation (SJ/T 11364 label and material declaration table) satisfies any Myanmar buyer contractual requirement referencing RoHS equivalence. Exporters should confirm project-specific contractual requirements where international financing is involved.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无横向 RoHS 立法。缅甸海关通关或市场准入不要求任何有害物质限制文件。中国 RoHS 披露文件（SJ/T 11364 标签及材料申报表）可满足缅甸采购方合同中引用 RoHS 等效要求的任何条款。涉及国际融资的项目，出口商应确认项目特定合同要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無橫向 RoHS 立法。緬甸海關通關或市場准入不要求任何有害物質限制文件。中國 RoHS 披露文件（SJ/T 11364 標籤及材料申報表）可滿足緬甸採購方合同中引用 RoHS 等效要求的任何條款。涉及國際融資的項目，出口商應確認項目特定合同要求。

requirement_topic.en: Mercury Content in LED Luminaires — No Myanmar Restriction
requirement_topic.zh: LED 灯具汞含量——缅甸无限制规定
requirement_topic.zht: LED 燈具汞含量——緬甸無限制規定

summary.en: Myanmar has no mandatory restriction on mercury content in LED lamps or luminaires as of 2026. The Minamata Convention on Mercury entered into force globally in 2017; Myanmar ratified the Convention in 2014. However, as of 2026, Minamata obligations for specific-use mercury-added lamps (such as compact fluorescent lamps) do not extend to LED luminaires, which by design contain no added mercury. MSTRD has not published a mandatory MS standard restricting mercury content in LED products. LED luminaires are generally mercury-free by design — this row documents the absence of a Myanmar restriction rather than a compliance gap requiring action.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具中的汞含量没有强制性限制。《关于汞的水俣公约》于 2017 年在全球生效；缅甸于 2014 年批准了该公约。但截至 2026 年，水俣公约关于特定用途含汞灯具（如紧凑型荧光灯）的义务并不适用于 LED 灯具（后者在设计上不添加汞）。MSTRD 未发布限制 LED 产品汞含量的强制性 MS 标准。LED 灯具在设计上通常不含汞——本行记录的是缅甸无相关限制规定的现状，而非需要采取行动的合规差距。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具中的汞含量沒有強制性限制。《關於汞的水俣公約》於 2017 年在全球生效；緬甸於 2014 年批准了該公約。但截至 2026 年，水俣公約關於特定用途含汞燈具（如緊湊型熒光燈）的義務並不適用於 LED 燈具（後者在設計上不添加汞）。MSTRD 未發布限制 LED 產品汞含量的強制性 MS 標準。LED 燈具在設計上通常不含汞——本行記錄的是緬甸無相關限制規定的現狀，而非需要採取行動的合規差距。

standards_or_laws: Minamata Convention on Mercury (ratified by Myanmar 2014) — does not impose mercury content limits on LED luminaires
No Myanmar mandatory mercury content standard for LED luminaires as of 2026

summary.en: Under China RoHS (Order No. 32), mercury (Hg) is one of the six restricted substances with a concentration limit of 0.1 wt% (1000 ppm) for homogeneous materials in EEE products, including LED luminaires. LED luminaires are designed to be mercury-free and routinely comply with this limit. China has also enacted domestic Minamata Convention implementation measures addressing certain mercury-added lamp phase-outs (principally affecting fluorescent lamps, not LEDs). Mercury content must be declared in the SJ/T 11364 material declaration table for LED luminaire products.
summary.zh: 依据中国 RoHS（32 号令），汞（Hg）是六种限制物质之一，在电子电气产品（含 LED 灯具）均质材料中的浓度限值为 0.1 wt%（1000 ppm）。LED 灯具设计上不含汞，通常符合该限值。中国还颁布了水俣公约国内实施措施，涉及部分含汞灯具的淘汰（主要影响荧光灯，不涉及 LED）。LED 灯具产品的 SJ/T 11364 材料申报表须申报汞含量。
summary.zht: 依據中國 RoHS（32 號令），汞（Hg）是六種限制物質之一，在電子電氣產品（含 LED 燈具）均質材料中的濃度限值為 0.1 wt%（1000 ppm）。LED 燈具設計上不含汞，通常符合該限值。中國還頒布了水俣公約國內實施措施，涉及部分含汞燈具的淘汰（主要影響熒光燈，不涉及 LED）。LED 燈具產品的 SJ/T 11364 材料申報表須申報汞含量。

standards_or_laws: Management Methods for Restriction of Use of Hazardous Substances in EEE (Order No. 32) — Hg limit 0.1 wt% in homogeneous materials
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Mercury content disclosure in material declaration table

gap.en: No compliance gap exists for mercury in the China-to-Myanmar direction: Myanmar imposes no mercury restriction on LED luminaires; LED luminaires are mercury-free by design and already comply with China RoHS limits. No additional action is required for Myanmar market entry with respect to mercury content. Exporters should retain existing CN material declaration tables as supporting documentation for buyer due diligence purposes.
gap.zh: 中国向缅甸出口方向，汞含量不存在合规差距：缅甸对 LED 灯具无汞含量限制；LED 灯具设计上不含汞，已符合中国 RoHS 限值。进入缅甸市场在汞含量方面无需额外行动。出口商应保留现有中国材料申报表，作为采购方尽职调查的支持文件。
gap.zht: 中國向緬甸出口方向，汞含量不存在合規差距：緬甸對 LED 燈具無汞含量限制；LED 燈具設計上不含汞，已符合中國 RoHS 限值。進入緬甸市場在汞含量方面無需額外行動。出口商應保留現有中國材料申報表，作為採購方盡職調查的支持文件。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — no mercury content restriction for LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory disclosure — mercury content must be declared in SJ/T 11364 material declaration table; RoHS concentration limit 0.1 wt% in homogeneous materials applies under Order No. 32

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory mercury restriction for LED luminaires. LED luminaires are mercury-free by design and comply with China RoHS limits. No Myanmar-specific mercury documentation is required. Exporters should retain CN material declaration data for buyer due diligence purposes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性汞限制要求。LED 灯具设计上不含汞，已符合中国 RoHS 限值。缅甸不要求特定汞含量文件。出口商应保留中国材料申报数据以备采购方尽职调查使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性汞限制要求。LED 燈具設計上不含汞，已符合中國 RoHS 限值。緬甸不要求特定汞含量文件。出口商應保留中國材料申報數據以備採購方盡職調查使用。

requirement_topic.en: Lead, Cadmium, and Other Restricted Substances — Myanmar No Restriction
requirement_topic.zh: 铅、镉及其他限制物质——缅甸无限制规定
requirement_topic.zht: 鉛、鎘及其他限制物質——緬甸無限制規定

summary.en: Myanmar has no mandatory restrictions on lead (Pb), cadmium (Cd), hexavalent chromium (Cr6+), polybrominated biphenyls (PBB), or polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE) in LED luminaires as of 2026. There is no Myanmar equivalent of the EU RoHS substance list or China's Order No. 32 restricted substance framework applicable to LED luminaires at the border. Myanmar's environmental and chemical management regulations do not currently extend to product-level restricted substance content limits for electrical goods. This row documents the absence of Myanmar-side restrictions rather than a gap requiring corrective action from Chinese exporters.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具中的铅（Pb）、镉（Cd）、六价铬（Cr6+）、多溴联苯（PBB）及多溴二苯醚（PBDE）没有强制性限制。缅甸没有与欧盟 RoHS 物质清单或中国 32 号令限制物质框架相当、在边境适用于 LED 灯具的法规。缅甸现行环境和化学品管理法规尚未延伸至电气产品产品层面的限制物质含量限值。本行记录的是缅甸方面不存在限制规定的现状，而非中国出口商需要采取纠正行动的差距。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具中的鉛（Pb）、鎘（Cd）、六價鉻（Cr6+）、多溴聯苯（PBB）及多溴二苯醚（PBDE）沒有強制性限制。緬甸沒有與歐盟 RoHS 物質清單或中國 32 號令限制物質框架相當、在邊境適用於 LED 燈具的法規。緬甸現行環境和化學品管理法規尚未延伸至電氣產品產品層面的限制物質含量限值。本行記錄的是緬甸方面不存在限制規定的現狀，而非中國出口商需要採取糾正行動的差距。

standards_or_laws: No mandatory restricted substance content limits for LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026
Myanmar Environmental Conservation Law (2012) — does not impose product-level RoHS-equivalent limits for electrical goods

summary.en: China's Order No. 32 (2016/2019) mandates restricted substance content limits for six hazardous substances in homogeneous materials of EEE products: Pb ≤0.1 wt%, Hg ≤0.1 wt%, Cd ≤0.01 wt%, Cr6+ ≤0.1 wt%, PBB ≤0.1 wt%, PBDE ≤0.1 wt%. All six substances must be declared in the SJ/T 11364 material declaration table affixed to the product or its packaging. LED luminaires supplied for the CN market must comply with these limits and carry the China RoHS "e" mark with a Hazardous Substance Content Table.
summary.zh: 中国 32 号令（2016/2019）对电子电气产品均质材料中六种有害物质的含量设定强制性限值：Pb ≤0.1 wt%、Hg ≤0.1 wt%、Cd ≤0.01 wt%、Cr6+ ≤0.1 wt%、PBB ≤0.1 wt%、PBDE ≤0.1 wt%。六种物质均须在贴附于产品或包装上的 SJ/T 11364 材料申报表中申报。面向中国市场供货的 LED 灯具须符合上述限值，并贴附含有害物质含量表的中国 RoHS「e」标识。
summary.zht: 中國 32 號令（2016/2019）對電子電氣產品均質材料中六種有害物質的含量設定強制性限值：Pb ≤0.1 wt%、Hg ≤0.1 wt%、Cd ≤0.01 wt%、Cr6+ ≤0.1 wt%、PBB ≤0.1 wt%、PBDE ≤0.1 wt%。六種物質均須在貼附於產品或包裝上的 SJ/T 11364 材料申報表中申報。面向中國市場供貨的 LED 燈具須符合上述限值，並貼附含有害物質含量表的中國 RoHS「e」標識。

standards_or_laws: Management Methods for Restriction of Use of Hazardous Substances in EEE (Order No. 32, 2016/2019) — six substance limits
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Hazardous Substance Content Table marking for EEE products

gap.en: No compliance gap exists in the China-to-Myanmar direction for lead, cadmium, or other RoHS-equivalent substances: Myanmar imposes no restricted substance content limits on LED luminaires. Chinese products compliant with CN Order No. 32 already satisfy any conceivable Myanmar buyer contractual requirement. No additional testing, labelling, or documentation is required for Myanmar market entry on restricted substance grounds. Exporters should retain existing CN material declaration documentation as part of their product technical file for buyer due diligence and any future regulatory change in Myanmar.
gap.zh: 中国向缅甸出口方向，铅、镉及其他 RoHS 等效物质不存在合规差距：缅甸对 LED 灯具无限制物质含量要求。符合中国 32 号令的中国产品已满足缅甸采购方任何可能的合同要求。进入缅甸市场在限制物质方面无需额外测试、标注或文件。出口商应在产品技术文件中保留现有中国材料申报文件，以备采购方尽职调查及缅甸未来法规变化之需。
gap.zht: 中國向緬甸出口方向，鉛、鎘及其他 RoHS 等效物質不存在合規差距：緬甸對 LED 燈具無限制物質含量要求。符合中國 32 號令的中國產品已滿足緬甸採購方任何可能的合同要求。進入緬甸市場在限制物質方面無需額外測試、標注或文件。出口商應在產品技術文件中保留現有中國材料申報文件，以備採購方盡職調查及緬甸未來法規變化之需。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable — Myanmar has no restricted substance content limits for LED luminaires as of 2026; no Pb, Cd, Cr6+, PBB, or PBDE documentation required for Myanmar market entry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Order No. 32 content limits (Pb/Hg/Cr6+/PBB/PBDE ≤0.1 wt%, Cd ≤0.01 wt%) apply to all EEE homogeneous materials; SJ/T 11364 material declaration table and RoHS «e» mark required on product

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory restricted substance (Pb, Cd, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE) limits for LED luminaires as of 2026. No RoHS-equivalent documentation is required for Myanmar customs clearance or market entry. Chinese products complying with CN Order No. 32 meet any Myanmar buyer contractual requirement. Exporters are advised to retain material declaration tables in the product technical file for future compliance readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性限制物质（Pb、Cd、Cr6+、PBB、PBDE）含量要求。缅甸海关通关或市场准入不要求 RoHS 等效文件。符合中国 32 号令的中国产品满足缅甸采购方的任何合同要求。建议出口商在产品技术文件中保留材料申报表，以备未来合规之需。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性限制物質（Pb、Cd、Cr6+、PBB、PBDE）含量要求。緬甸海關通關或市場准入不要求 RoHS 等效文件。符合中國 32 號令的中國產品滿足緬甸採購方的任何合同要求。建議出口商在產品技術文件中保留材料申報表，以備未來合規之需。
